name: New Order
bio: New Order built a catalog that still monetizes through club culture, streaming, and decades of influence across pop and electronic music.
notable_for: Electronic crossover songs with exceptional long-tail playlist and club-life durability.
career_highlight: Songs like Blue Monday remain unusually resilient for both mainstream and niche catalog economics.
revenue_drivers: Playlist and club-oriented listening keep the catalog active.
Licensing and documentary use reinforce their catalog relevance.
